title: Look up project by Spanish mobile number and resume at correct step
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish mobile number on the phone lookup screen and is redirected into their project with the next required step shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in a Spanish mobile phone number known to the app into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify the customer is redirected into a project flow identified by a code in the URL
Verify the next required project step is displayed

title: Assessor can log in and view submitted projects list
description: Verifies an assessor can authenticate to the dashboard and see the list of submitted projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard projects list is displayed

title: Submit project from review and see success screen
description: Verifies a customer can submit the project from the review step and sees a success confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Submit the project from the review step
Verify a success confirmation screen is displayed

title: Assessor can download the full project ZIP archive
description: Verifies an assessor can download the ZIP archive containing all files for a project.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Initiate download of the project's ZIP archive
Verify the browser initiates a file download

title: Assessor can open a project and review assets and extracted metadata
description: Verifies an assessor can open a project detail view and see uploaded assets and extracted data.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Verify the project detail view is displayed
Verify uploaded assets and extracted metadata are displayed

title: Complete document collection and continue to province selection
description: Verifies a customer can upload all required documents, review extracted identity fields, and proceed to the province selection step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload an identity document front photo
Upload an identity document back photo
Verify AI-extracted identity fields are displayed for review
Upload an IBI certificate file
Upload at least one electricity bill file
Click the continue control for the property documents step
Verify the province selection step is displayed

title: Apply injected signature and proceed to next step
description: Verifies a customer can inject a test signature, apply all required document signatures, and proceed to the next section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Execute window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a valid signature into the signature pad
Click the control to apply signatures and continue
Verify the user is taken to the next section after representation

title: Select Cataluña manually and proceed to representation signing
description: Verifies the customer can manually select Cataluña when province is not auto-detected and proceed to the representation step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Click the manual province selection control
Select Cataluña from the province list
Click the continue control for the province step
Verify the representation signing step is displayed

title: Assessor can download an individual asset from a project
description: Verifies an assessor can download a single uploaded asset from within a project detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Initiate download for an individual asset
Verify the browser initiates a file download

title: Defer signing and continue to next step
description: Verifies a customer can choose to defer signing and still proceed to the next section.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the control to defer signing for now
Verify the user is taken to the next section after representation

title: Complete energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies a customer can complete the 4-step energy certificate survey and arrive at the review step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill in valid housing data on step 1
Click next to advance to step 2
Fill in valid openings data on step 2
Click next to advance to step 3
Fill in valid thermal systems data on step 3
Click next to advance to step 4
Fill in valid additional info on step 4
Confirm completion of the energy certificate survey
Verify the app proceeds to the review step

title: Navigate from review to fix an item and return to review
description: Verifies a customer can leave review to address a checklist item and return to review to continue submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250005
Click a checklist item to navigate to its corresponding step
Click the control to return to the review step
Verify the checklist is displayed on the review step

title: Assessor can log out and return to dashboard login screen
description: Verifies an assessor can end the session from the dashboard and is returned to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Log out of the dashboard
Verify the dashboard login screen is displayed

title: Skip entire energy certificate survey and reach review
description: Verifies a customer can skip the energy certificate survey and proceed to the review step with energy certificate marked as skipped.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click the control to skip the entire energy certificate survey
Verify the app proceeds to the review step

title: Prevent applying signatures when no signature is provided
description: Verifies the customer cannot proceed with applying signatures when the signature pad is empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the control to apply signatures and continue
Verify the user remains on the representation step and cannot proceed

title: Assessor can export the projects list as CSV
description: Verifies an assessor can export the dashboard projects list as a CSV file.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Export the projects list as CSV
Verify the browser initiates a file download

title: Representation continue control remains disabled until signature exists
description: Verifies the continue/apply control is disabled until a signature is present on the canvas.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Verify the apply/continue control is disabled before a signature is provided
Execute window.__eltexFillTestSignature() to inject a valid signature into the signature pad
Verify the apply/continue control becomes enabled once a signature is present

title: Navigate back from province selection to property documents
description: Verifies the customer can go back from province selection and return to the property documents step.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250002
Click the back control on the province step
Verify the property documents step is displayed

title: Assessor can open an asset preview from a project
description: Verifies an assessor can open an individual asset in a new tab/window for preview from within a project detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the password field
Submit the login form
Open a project detail view from the projects list
Open an individual asset in the viewer
Verify an asset preview is displayed

title: Energy certificate step gating blocks next when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the survey prevents progressing to the next step when required inputs for the current step are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Click next to attempt to advance without entering required data for step 1
Verify a validation error is visible and the user remains on the current step

title: Energy certificate wizard supports back navigation without losing progress
description: Verifies a customer can move forward and back within the energy certificate wizard and still complete it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250004
Fill in valid housing data on step 1
Click next to advance to step 2
Click back to return to step 1
Click next to advance to step 2 again
Click next to advance through remaining steps, filling valid data as required
Confirm completion of the energy certificate survey
Verify the app proceeds to the review step

title: Back navigation returns to previous step from representation
description: Verifies a customer can navigate back from the representation step to the previous section without breaking the flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250001
Click the control to go back from representation
Verify the user is taken to the previous section in the flow

title: Block progression when DNI/NIE back side is missing
description: Verifies the customer cannot continue when only the identity document front is uploaded and a validation error requests the back-side upload.

steps.description: Navigate to /?code=ELT20250003
Upload an identity document front photo
Click the continue control for the property documents step
Verify an identity document back-side validation error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the property documents step

title: Show not-found error for unknown phone number
description: Verifies an unknown Spanish mobile number cannot start a project and an error is shown instead of redirecting.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an unknown Spanish mobile phone number into the phone number field
Submit the phone lookup
Verify a phone not found error is displayed
Verify the user remains on the phone entry step
